Repo: addyosmani/agent-skills Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Topics: agent-skills, antigravity, antigravity-ide, claude-code, cursor, skills Stars: 62813 README: # Agent Skills **Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.** Skills encode the workflows, quality gates, and best practices that senior engineers use when building software. These ones are packaged so AI agents follow them consistently across every phase of development. ![Addy's Agent Skills](https://addyosmani.com/assets/images/addys-agent-skills.jpg) ``` DEFINE PLAN BUILD VERIFY REVIEW SHIP 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聦芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聬 芒聰聜 Idea 芒聰聜 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聳露 芒聰聜 Spec 芒聰聜 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聳露 芒聰聜 Code 芒聰聜 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聳露 芒聰聜 Test 芒聰聜 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聳露 芒聰聜 QA 芒聰聜 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聳露 芒聰聜 Go 芒聰聜 芒聰聜Refine芒聰聜 芒聰聜 PRD 芒聰聜 芒聰聜 Impl 芒聰聜 芒聰聜Debug 芒聰聜 芒聰聜 Gate 芒聰聜 芒聰聜 Live 芒聰聜 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 芒聰聰芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聵 /spec /plan /build /test /review /ship ``` --- ## Commands 7 slash commands that map to the development lifecycle. Each one activates the right skills automatically. | What you're doing | Command | Key principle | |-------------------|---------|---------------| | Define what to build | `/spec` | Spec before code | | Plan how to build it | `/plan` | Small, atomic tasks | | Build incrementally | `/build` | One slice at a time | | Prove it works | `/test` | Tests are proof | | Review before merge | `/review` | Improve code health | | Simplify the code | `/code-simplify` | Clarity over cleverness | | Ship to production | `/ship` | Faster is safer | Want fewer manual steps once the spec exists? **`/build auto`** generates the plan and implements every task in a single approved pass 芒聙聰 you approve the plan once, then it runs autonomously. It removes the human stepping *between* tasks, not the verification: every task is still test-driven and committed individually, and it pauses on failures or risky steps. Skills also activate automatically based on what you're doing 芒聙聰 designing an API triggers `api-and-interface-design`, building UI triggers `frontend-ui-engineering`, and so on. --- ## Quick Start
Claude Code (recommended) **Marketplace install:** ``` /plugin marketplace add addyosmani/agent-skills /plugin install agent-skills@addy-agent-skills ``` > **SSH errors?** The marketplace clones repos via SSH. If you don't have SSH keys set up on GitHub, either [add your SSH key](https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/connecting-to-github-with-ssh/adding-a-new-ssh-key-to-your-github-account) or use the full HTTPS URL to force the HTTPS cloning: > ```bash > /plugin marketplace add https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills.git > /plugin install agent-skills@addy-agent-skills > ``` **Local / development:** ```bash git clon
